# Mirza Beširović — mirza.tech

> Personal site of Mirza Beširović, Director of Product, AI Agents at Zendesk, based in Berlin. AI product leader, advisor, and conference speaker. He writes the newsletter You Are the Product.

## Who he is

Mirza Beširović runs product for Zendesk AI Agents, the company's flagship AI automation platform. With his team he has scaled it to $100M+ ARR, automating 80%+ of customer interactions for Netflix, Vimeo, Levi's, Reddit, and thousands of others. He helped shape its commercial model: Zendesk was the first CX vendor to price AI per automated resolution.

Before Zendesk he built AI and automation platforms at Ultimate.ai and Dixa, through hypergrowth and two M&A integrations (Solvemate → Dixa, 2022; Ultimate.ai → Zendesk, 2024). He started his career as a translator and interpreter.

## What he speaks about

- AI transformation: why most AI pilots stall and what taking one to $100M actually required
- AI-native leadership: how leaders restructure their own work, product organizations, and operating models around AI
- The Three Tensions of building AI agents at scale: the Control Paradox, the Orchestration Trap, the Evolution Crisis
- The agentic era of product management: prototypes over PRDs, context architecture, spec-driven development, and evals as a core product skill

Formats: keynotes, fireside chats, panels, podcasts. Talks in English.

## Advisory

He works with founders and product leaders on AI product strategy, agentic organizations, and M&A integration.
